fù zé rèn de tài dù

key_sentences.chinese: 与其抱怨困难，不如积极地寻找解决办法。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yǔ qí bào yuàn kùn nán, bù rú jī jí de xún zhǎo jiě jué bàn fǎ.
key_sentences.english: Rather than complaining about difficulties, it is better to proactively look for solutions.

key_sentences.chinese: 无论如何，一个诚实的人总会赢得别人的尊重。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wú lùn rú hé, yí gè chéng shí de rén zǒng huì yíng dé bié rén de zūn zhòng.
key_sentences.english: No matter what, an honest person will always earn the respect of others.

key_sentences.chinese: 他在困难面前表现出了坚强的意志力，让大家非常佩服。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā zài kùn nán miàn qián biǎo xiàn chū le jiān qiáng de yì zhì lì, ràng dà jiā fēi cháng pèi fú.
key_sentences.english: He displayed great willpower in the face of difficulty, which everyone found very admirable.

key_sentences.chinese: 她做事非常细心，从来不会出差错。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò shì fēi cháng xì xīn, cóng lái bú huì chū chā cuò.
key_sentences.english: She is extremely careful in everything she does and never makes mistakes.

key_sentences.chinese: 一个负责任的人，无论如何都不会逃避自己的义务。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yí gè fù zé rèn de rén, wú lùn rú hé dōu bú huì táo bì zì jǐ de yì wù.
key_sentences.english: A responsible person will never shirk their duties, no matter what.

key_sentences.chinese: 保持乐观的态度，与其担心未来，不如好好把握现在。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bǎo chí lè guān de tài dù, yǔ qí dān xīn wèi lái, bù rú hǎo hǎo bǎ wò xiàn zài.
key_sentences.english: Maintain an optimistic attitude — rather than worrying about the future, it is better to make the most of the present.

key_sentences.chinese: 一个诚实守信、积极负责任的人在社会上会受到尊重。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yī gè chéng shí shǒu xìn, jī jí fù zé rèn de rén zài shè huì shàng huì shòu dào zūn zhòng.
key_sentences.english: A person who is honest, trustworthy, positive, and responsible will be respected in society.

key_sentences.chinese: 她勇敢自信地面对困难，展现了良好的个人品格。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā yǒng gǎn zì xìn de miàn duì kùn nán, zhǎn xiàn le liáng hǎo de gè rén pǐn gé.
key_sentences.english: She faced difficulties bravely and confidently, demonstrating good personal character.

key_sentences.chinese: 细心和耐心是一个负责任的人应该具备的品质。
key_sentences.pinyin: Xì xīn hé nài xīn shì yī gè fù zé rèn de rén yīng gāi jù bèi de pǐn zhì.
key_sentences.english: Carefulness and patience are qualities that a responsible person should possess.

grammar_points.title: 与其…不如… — Rather than… it is better to…
grammar_points.explanation: 与其…不如… is used to compare two options and recommend one over the other. It means 'rather than doing A, it is better to do B'. Structure: 与其 + action A + 不如 + action B. It implies that B is the wiser or more sensible choice. 与其等待，不如主动出击 - Rather than waiting, it is better to take the initiative.

examples.chinese: 与其整天抱怨，不如培养积极乐观的心态。
examples.pinyin: Yǔ qí zhěng tiān bào yuàn, bù rú péi yǎng jī jí lè guān de xīn tài.
examples.english: Rather than complaining all day, it is better to cultivate a positive and optimistic mindset.

examples.chinese: 与其对朋友不诚实，不如勇敢地说出真相。
examples.pinyin: Yǔ qí duì péng yǒu bù chéng shí, bù rú yǒng gǎn de shuō chū zhēn xiàng.
examples.english: Rather than being dishonest with a friend, it is better to bravely tell the truth.

exercises.question: _____ 在家里烦恼，_____ 出去运动，保持积极的心态。
Choose the sentence that uses 与其…不如… correctly.
exercises.correct: 与其逃避责任，不如勇敢地面对问题。
options: 与其逃避责任，不如勇敢地面对问题。
不如逃避责任，与其勇敢地面对问题。
与其勇敢地面对问题，不如逃避责任。
勇敢与其，不如面对问题逃避责任。
option_pinyin: Yǔ qí táo bì zé rèn, bù rú yǒng gǎn de miàn duì wèn tí.
Bù rú táo bì zé rèn, yǔ qí yǒng gǎn de miàn duì wèn tí.
Yǔ qí yǒng gǎn de miàn duì wèn tí, bù rú táo bì zé rèn.
Yǒng gǎn yǔ qí, bù rú miàn duì wèn tí táo bì zé rèn.

exercises.question: What does 与其…不如… express?
exercises.correct: Rather than A, it is better to do B
options: Rather than A, it is better to do B
Both A and B are equally good
Neither A nor B is acceptable

exercises.question: 与其一直担心，_____ 想办法解决问题。
In 与其…不如…, which option does the speaker recommend?

grammar_points.title: 无论如何 — No matter what; anyway
grammar_points.explanation: 无论如何 means 'no matter what', 'in any case', or 'regardless'. It is used to stress that the outcome or statement holds true under all circumstances. Structure: 无论如何 + (subject) + verb/adjective. It often appears at the start of a clause. 无论如何，你都要坚强 - No matter what, you must stay strong.

examples.chinese: 无论如何，一个有意志力的人都不会轻易放弃。
examples.pinyin: Wú lùn rú hé, yí gè yǒu yì zhì lì de rén dōu bú huì qīng yì fàng qì.
examples.english: No matter what, a person with willpower will never give up easily.

examples.chinese: 无论如何，她都保持着乐观的态度，从不抱怨。
examples.pinyin: Wú lùn rú hé, tā dōu bǎo chí zhe lè guān de tài dù, cóng bú bào yuàn.
examples.english: No matter what, she always maintains an optimistic attitude and never complains.

exercises.question: _____ ，你都应该对自己的行为负责任。
Choose the correct sentence using 无论如何.
exercises.correct: 无论如何，他都不会对朋友不诚实。
options: 无论如何，他都不会对朋友不诚实。
他无论，如何都不会对朋友不诚实。
无论他如何，都不会对朋友不诚实。
他都不会，无论如何对朋友不诚实。
option_pinyin: Wú lùn rú hé, tā dōu bú huì duì péng yǒu bù chéng shí.
Tā wú lùn, rú hé dōu bú huì duì péng yǒu bù chéng shí.
Wú lùn tā rú hé, dōu bú huì duì péng yǒu bù chéng shí.
Tā dōu bú huì, wú lùn rú hé duì péng yǒu bù chéng shí.

exercises.question: What does 无论如何 mean?
exercises.correct: No matter what; in any case
options: No matter what; in any case

exercises.question: 无论如何，我们都要保持 _____ 的心态。
Which sentence uses 无论如何 correctly?
exercises.correct: 无论如何，我都会支持你的决定。
options: 无论如何，我都会支持你的决定。
我都会支持你的决定无论如何。
我无论，如何都会支持你的决定。
无论我如何，都会支持的你决定。

grammar_points.title: 表现出 — To show; to display
grammar_points.explanation: 表现出 means 'to show', 'to display', or 'to manifest' a quality or characteristic. Structure: Subject + 表现出 + quality/noun. It is used when someone or something demonstrates a particular trait in a visible or noticeable way. 她表现出了极大的耐心 - She showed great patience.

examples.chinese: 在压力面前，他表现出了难得的冷静和自信。
examples.pinyin: Zài yā lì miàn qián, tā biǎo xiàn chū le nán dé de lěng jìng hé zì xìn.
examples.english: Under pressure, he displayed a rare calmness and confidence.

examples.chinese: 这位老人在面对困难时，始终表现得坚强和乐观。
examples.pinyin: Zhè wèi lǎo rén zài miàn duì kùn nán shí, shǐ zhōng biǎo xiàn de jiān qiáng hé lè guān.
examples.english: This elderly person consistently showed strength and optimism when facing difficulties.

exercises.question: 她在紧急情况下 _____ 了很强的意志力。
Choose the correct sentence using 表现出.
exercises.correct: 他在比赛中表现出了极大的勇气。
options: 他在比赛中表现出了极大的勇气。
他表现出在比赛中了极大的勇气。
极大的勇气他在比赛中表现出了。
在比赛表现出了他中极大的勇气。
option_pinyin: Tā zài bǐ sài zhōng biǎo xiàn chū le jí dà de yǒng qì.
Tā biǎo xiàn chū zài bǐ sài zhōng le jí dà de yǒng qì.
Jí dà de yǒng qì tā zài bǐ sài zhōng biǎo xiàn chū le.
Zài bǐ sài biǎo xiàn chū le tā zhōng jí dà de yǒng qì.

exercises.question: What does 表现出 mean?
exercises.correct: To show; to display a quality
options: To show; to display a quality

exercises.question: 她对学生非常耐心，_____ 了一名好老师应有的品质。
Which follows directly after 表现出 in a sentence?
exercises.correct: A quality, characteristic, or noun phrase
options: A quality, characteristic, or noun phrase

culture_notes.title: Virtues Valued in Chinese Culture
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国文化中重视的美德
culture_notes.content: Chinese culture places great emphasis on moral virtues (美德, měi dé) and personal character. Confucian thought (儒家思想, Rú jiā sī xiǎng), which has shaped Chinese society for over two thousand years, highlights values such as 仁 (rén, benevolence), 义 (yì, righteousness), 礼 (lǐ, propriety), 智 (zhì, wisdom), and 信 (xìn, trustworthiness). In everyday life, qualities such as humility (谦虚, qiān xū), patience (耐心, nài xīn), and honesty (诚实, chéng shí) are widely admired. Chinese parents often encourage children to be 懂事 (dǒng shì) — sensible and aware of others' feelings — as a sign of good character. Expressions like 做人要厚道 (zuò rén yào hòu dào, 'Be generous and decent in how you treat people') reflect the importance placed on integrity and kindness in personal conduct.

idioms.english: To win people over by virtue — to earn respect through one's moral character

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: _____ 抱怨，不如积极地解决问题。
What does 与其…不如… express?
quiz.correct: Rather than A, it is better to do B
options: Rather than A, it is better to do B
Both A and B are true

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: _____ ，你都要保持诚实。
Choose the correct sentence using 表现出.
quiz.correct: 她在困难时表现出了坚强的意志力。
options: 她在困难时表现出了坚强的意志力。
她表现出困难时了坚强的意志力。
坚强表现出了她在困难时意志力。
意志力在困难时她表现出了坚强。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 充满自信 mean?
The idiom 以德服人 means:
quiz.correct: To win people over by virtue and moral character
options: To win people over by virtue and moral character
To force people to obey through power
To use money to gain respect

quiz.question: What does the phrase 积极乐观 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'no matter what; anyway'?
Fill in: 细心和耐心是一个善良 _____ 的人应该具备的品质。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你认识苏轼吗？他真的是一个非常诚实负责任的人。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ rèn shi Sū Shì ma? Tā zhēn de shì yí gè fēi cháng chéng shí fù zé rèn de rén.
lines.english: Do you know Su Shi? He is truly a very honest and responsible person.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然认识！他在困难面前总是表现出坚强的意志力，让人佩服。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán rèn shi! Tā zài kùn nán miàn qián zǒng shì biǎo xiàn chū jiān qiáng de yì zhì lì, ràng rén pèi fú.
lines.english: Of course I know him! He always shows strong willpower in the face of difficulty — it's admirable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 是啊，而且他总是保持乐观的心态，从来不抱怨。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, ér qiě tā zǒng shì bǎo chí lè guān de xīn tài, cóng lái bú bào yuàn.
lines.english: Yes, and he always maintains an optimistic attitude — he never complains.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 与其只是羡慕他，不如向他学习，培养自己的自信和耐心。
lines.pinyin: Yǔ qí zhǐ shì xiàn mù tā, bù rú xiàng tā xué xí, péi yǎng zì jǐ de zì xìn hé nài xīn.
lines.english: Rather than just admiring him, it is better to learn from him and develop our own confidence and patience.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你说得对！他还特别谦虚，从不觉得自己比别人强。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì! Tā hái tè bié qiān xū, cóng bù jué de zì jǐ bǐ bié rén qiáng.
lines.english: You're right! He is also very humble and never thinks he is better than others.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这种善良和谦虚的品质，真的值得我们好好学习。
lines.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng shàn liáng hé qiān xū de pǐn zhì, zhēn de zhí de wǒ men hǎo hǎo xué xí.
lines.english: These qualities of kindness and humility are truly worth learning from.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 没错，做一个诚实、积极、负责任的人，才是真正的成功。
lines.pinyin: Méi cuò, zuò yí gè chéng shí, jī jí, fù zé rèn de rén, cái shì zhēn zhèng de chéng gōng.
lines.english: Exactly — being an honest, proactive, and responsible person is what true success really means.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王老师，我今天面试没发挥好，感觉自己不够自信。
lines.pinyin: Wáng lǎo shī, wǒ jīn tiān miàn shì méi fā huī hǎo, gǎn jué zì jǐ bú gòu zì xìn.
lines.english: Teacher Wang, I didn't perform well in today's interview; I felt I wasn't confident enough.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 别太担心，与其后悔，不如认真总结这次经验，下次做得更好。
lines.pinyin: Bié tài dān xīn, yǔ qí hòu huǐ, bù rú rèn zhēn zǒng jié zhè cì jīng yàn, xià cì zuò de gèng hǎo.
lines.english: Don't worry too much. Rather than regretting it, it is better to reflect carefully on this experience and do better next time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我觉得我在被问到困难的问题时，没能表现出足够的细心和耐心。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jué de wǒ zài bèi wèn dào kùn nán de wèn tí shí, méi néng biǎo xiàn chū zú gòu de xì xīn hé nài xīn.
lines.english: I felt that when asked difficult questions, I wasn't able to show enough care and patience.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 其实，面试官更看重你是否诚实，以及面对压力时是否能保持积极。
lines.pinyin: Qí shí, miàn shì guān gèng kàn zhòng nǐ shì fǒu chéng shí, yǐ jí miàn duì yā lì shí shì fǒu néng bǎo chí jī jí.
lines.english: In fact, interviewers care more about whether you are honest and whether you can stay positive under pressure.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我明白了。无论如何，我都要继续努力，培养自己的意志力。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míng bai le. Wú lùn rú hé, wǒ dōu yào jì xù nǔ lì, péi yǎng zì jǐ de yì zhì lì.
lines.english: I understand. No matter what, I will keep working hard and develop my own willpower.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对！你已经表现出了很多优秀的品质，只需要更充满自信地表达自己。
lines.pinyin: Duì! Nǐ yǐ jīng biǎo xiàn chū le hěn duō yōu xiù de pǐn zhì, zhǐ xū yào gèng chōng mǎn zì xìn de biǎo dá zì jǐ.
lines.english: Exactly! You have already shown many excellent qualities; you just need to express yourself with more confidence.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢老师！我会继续保持乐观，争取下次面试成功！
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie lǎo shī! Wǒ huì jì xù bǎo chí lè guān, zhēng qǔ xià cì miàn shì chéng gōng!
lines.english: Thank you, Teacher! I will keep staying optimistic and aim to succeed in my next interview!
